description: You are a fire safety officer updating the emergency response plan for a chemical storage facility. Research fire-fighting response information for Sodium, Acetone, and Magnesium on the CAMEO Chemicals website (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/). For each chemical, identify the recommended fire extinguishing agents and determine if water is safe or contraindicated. Compile a report at ~/Documents/fire_response_report.txt that includes the fire extinguishing recommendations for each chemical, identifies which are water-reactive, and provides a summary statement listing the chemicals where water must never be used.
